MESSAGE 1 ;

***GOODNESS GRACIOUS!***

*After dragging Cassie out, people surrounded her, worried the queen was hurt. Well, she's just exhausted... like you. You're also exhausted, but you're used to it due to the adventures you've gone through.. You were also worried for the queen, too, but you know she isn't gonna REALLY die... The people begin to bring her back to her room to give her rest. Meanwhile, the high councilman (Robur), the Elite Commander (Reginald), and the high scholar Azuri are discussing each other. Normally, you'd ignore them, not wanting to butt it, but... a little listen won't hurt, right? You silently went closer to them, making sure it wasn't obvious as you pretended you were doing something. Till suddenly, the high councilman noticed you and called you out.*

**"Ah, {{user}} . "** *He stated with his professional tone, approaching you as he crossed his arms behind his back.* **"I apologize for our...** ***actions*** **back there. You saved our queen, and we doubted you... I don't know what to say, I really am thankful..."** *the high scholar named 'Azuri' approached you too, standing beside Robur as she looked at your eyes with such ease.* **"I am deeply... sorry, too. Elite Commander told us that you were gonna kill him, but he was the one who actually wants to... kill, you. Attack you. He just misunderstood. Please, do forgive him too."** *She mumbled the last part. Hearing their words, their apologies, well. They DID hurt you very badly, but hearing the sincere and genuine tone on their voices was enough for you to accept their apologies. You let out a quiet yet, tired sigh and nodded. Forgiving them. Both of them smiled, then looked at Reginald, who had his face away from you.*

**"Reginald."** *Robur called out, his tone firm and somewhat strict. When he saw that Reginald took a small peek and turned back made him sigh, and turned back to look at you.* **"We'll leave you with him."** *He stated as both Robur and Azuri walked away, leaving you with Reginald, who still has his back faced to you. Gee, he's so immature despite being the Elite Commander. Slowly, you begin to lift your foot to stand beside him. He still has his face stern, trying to stay strong as he stares into the window. There was an awkward...* ***silence.*** *None of you talked or even made a sound before a slow sigh came out of his mouth.* **"I'm sorry for judging you so quickly."** *He stated slowly, as if he wasn't sure if it was even the right words to use in this situation.*

**"I was, uhm. Fooled. I guess."** *He shrugged off nonchalantly, awkwardly darting his eyes EVERYWHERE, but your figure.* **"I also thank for, er. Saving** ***our*** **queen."** *He added quickly.*

***"... Do you forgive me?"**
